task_completion.description: Verify the confidentiality warning is added at the top of the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'CONFIDENTIAL - CONTAINS ARCHAEOLOGICAL SITE LOCATIONS' at the very top of the document. It must be bold, colored red, and center-aligned.

task_completion.description: Verify the report title and seven major section headings are properly styled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the title 'Phase I Archaeological Survey of the Proposed Route 47 Expansion Project' formatted with a distinct 'Title' style (usually very large font). Also, verify that the 7 major section titles (e.g., '1.0 INTRODUCTION', '2.0 ENVIRONMENTAL SETTING') are formatted with a 'Heading 1' style (larger, bolded font distinct from the body text).

task_completion.description: Verify the scientific names in the Environmental Setting section are italicized.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look in the '2.0 ENVIRONMENTAL SETTING' section for the words 'Pinus taeda', 'Quercus alba', 'Odocoileus virginianus', and 'Meleagris gallopavo'. They must be formatted in italics.

task_completion.description: Verify the Shovel Test Pit (STP) data log is converted into a 5-column table with bold headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a native word processor table containing the STP data. It must have exactly 5 columns with the headers: 'Transect', 'STP No.', 'Depth (cm)', 'Stratigraphy', and 'Cultural Material'. The header row must be bolded.

task_completion.description: Verify the Artifact Catalog is converted into a 5-column table with bold headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a native word processor table containing the Artifact Catalog. It must have exactly 5 columns with the headers: 'Catalog No.', 'Context', 'Count', 'Material', and 'Description'. The header row must be bolded.

task_completion.description: Verify the bibliographic entries have hanging indents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the '7.0 REFERENCES CITED' section. The citations must be formatted with a hanging indent (the first line of each entry is flush left, and all subsequent lines of that entry are indented).

task_completion.description: Verify the formatted report is saved with the correct filename in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the application title bar or a file explorer window to confirm the document is named 'phase_i_report_formatted.docx' and is located in the '~/Documents/results/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a GUI word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the document open in a word processing application with visible toolbars, ribbons, or menus, rather than just terminal commands or a plain text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the tables are actual word processor tables, not just text aligned with spaces or tabs.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tables should have visible gridlines or cell boundaries typical of native tables in a word processor, and the table formatting tools should be visible or active when the table is selected.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a python script (e.g., python-docx) in the terminal to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show execution of Python scripts or pandoc commands that automatically format the document. The formatting should be done manually via the GUI.
